title: docs: consolidate CONTRIBUTING
body:
Move documentation about dependencies management from README.md to
CONTRIBUTING.md.

Closes #583

Signed-off-by: Silvano Cirujano Cuesta <silvano.cirujano-cuesta@siemens.com>

comments.body: couple nits that were probably pre-existing.  If you could squish them anyway I'd appreciate it.  Otherwise LGTM.
BTW, I usually don't close conversations started by someone else. I let the starter of a conversation decide when he/she considers it to be finished.

> couple nits that were probably pre-existing. If you could squish them anyway I'd appreciate it. Otherwise LGTM.

@TomSweeneyRedHat  had the right premonition, the typos were pre-existing. I've nevertheless fixed them.
@Silvanoc Could you squash your PRs and then we can merge.
LGTM and all green.  @silvanoc, sorry about not resolving, I generally don't but probably should....  Thanks for the updates, it looks much better now.
